name: Write File
description: Write a file under a configured filesystem root. Creates the file if it does not exist; truncates and overwrites otherwise. Parent directories must already exist — call file:mkdir first if needed. Supply exactly one of 'content' (UTF-8 text), 'value' (JSON-serialised), or 'bytes' (base64). Read-only roots reject writes.
creator: Covia

path.description: File path relative to the root

value.description: JSON-serialisable value to write as UTF-8 JSON

created.description: True if the file was newly created
